playbook.title: Organize Photos by Date
playbook.description: Scan a directory of photos, extract EXIF dates, and organize them into YYYY/MM folders
playbook.raw_text:
1. Scan the ~/Photos directory for all image files (.jpg, .png, .heic)
2. Extract EXIF date information from each photo
3. Create year/month folders (e.g., 2024/01, 2024/02)
4. Move photos into appropriate folders based on their date
5. Generate a summary report of what was moved

steps.description: Scan ~/Photos directory recursively for image files (.jpg, .jpeg, .png, .heic, .raw)
Write a Python script to extract EXIF date metadata from image files
Run the EXIF extraction script on all found images, collecting date information
Create the destination folder structure (YYYY/MM format) and move files
Generate a markdown summary report showing how many files were organized and any errors
